chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-1607 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.9483/2017 3. For hearing of main case 28-05-2019 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Memon, State Counsel.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Even on the last date of hearing brief was held on behalf of counsel for the petitioner as he was out of station. It appears that after filing this petition the petitioner has lost interest, therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
